chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acq. Appeal No. D- 29 of 2024 Date of hearing Order With Signature Of Judge. Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.909/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.910/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 19.11.2024 Appellant Muhammad Usama present in person O R D E R Per impugned judgment, which was announced on 22.04.2024, however, appellant filed an application seeking its true copy on 21.05.2024, which was readily available and delivered to him on the very same day even then he filed the instant appeal before this Court on 19.10.2024. No justification for filing the Appeal with such delay has been given, even no application in terms of the provisions of Limitation Act, has been filed. It is settled law that delay of each and every day has to be explained and in the instant case nothing has been brought which may warrant interference. Since this is an appeal against acquittal and in certain cases the superior Courts have avoided to interfere in the acquittal findings handed down by the Courts below. Accordingly, in view of the above legal cum factual position, the instant appeal is hopelessly time barred which is hereby dismissed in limine along with pending applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
